code:
fn double_positive(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  if n > 0
    Ok(2 * n)
  else
    Err("non-positive")
  end
end

fn add_ten(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  Ok(n + 10)
end

fn process(_ n: Int) -> Result<Int, String>
  match double_positive(n)
  when Ok(v)
    add_ten(v)
  when Err(e)
    Err(e)
  end
end

fn report(_ n: Int) -> Unit
  match process(n)
  when Ok(v)
    println("result=#{v}")
  when Err(e)
    println("error=#{e}")
  end
end

report(5)
report(-3)
